sections.instruction: Complete the notes/form/sentences below. For Questions 1-3, write ONE WORD OR A NUMBER. For Questions 4-6, write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. For Questions 7-10, write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.

Complete the sentences/table below. For Questions 11-15, write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer. For Questions 16-18, write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer. For Questions 19-20, write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Complete the notes below. For Questions 21-25, write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. For Questions 26-30, write ONE WORD AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.content:

26. ‘Growing Area’ is about {{BLANK}} kilometers
27. Scientists have taken {{BLANK}} of the soil in the Yucatan.
28. The university’s own geology department has also analysed the {{BLANK}} at the site.
29. The {{BLANK}} in Dr. Horst’s books are very useful and worth studying.
30. The student needs a {{BLANK}} to do presentation.

sections.instruction: For Questions 31-32, choose the correct letter A, B or C. For Questions 33-35, write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer. For Questions 36-40, write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
